headline: Wall Street may be misreading the Fed
detail: A circulating thesis says markets are underpricing a Fed dovish shift, which would be a direct tailwind for tech, chips, and growth names. This is the most important macro catalyst for your concentrated book right now. If it plays out, SMH, QQQ, and CRWD benefit most.

headline: Cybersecurity stocks soaring, Big Tech rebounding
detail: Headline confirms cybersecurity sector strength today, directly supporting your CRWD HOLD. Big Tech rebound momentum also helps QQQ and SMH. This is the one bright spot across your holdings — CRWD is working.

headline: Oil rises on U.S.-Iran deal, crude back above $70
detail: Rising oil can shift rotation away from tech into energy, creating a headwind for your 90% tech-chip concentration. Not a crisis, but worth watching — sector rotation is a known pressure valve that hits growth names when commodities spike.

headline: Supreme Court blocks Trump from firing Fed Governor Cook
detail: Fed independence is preserved for now, which reduces policy uncertainty. Markets generally react well to Fed stability signals, a mild positive for rate-sensitive tech and growth stocks in your book.
